howItWorks.intro: This molarity calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Molarity
rules.formula: M = (mass / molar mass) / volume in L
rules.explanation: Moles divided by volume in liters.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Moles of solute per liter of solution (M = mol/L).

faq.q: How do I find molar mass?
faq.a: Sum the atomic masses of all atoms in the molecular formula. NaCl = 22.99 + 35.45 = 58.44.
